description: This Java class defines a REST controller for authentication endpoints including registration, login, MFA verification, token refresh, and logout, utilizing Spring Boot annotations and Swagger documentation.

classes.name: AuthController
classes.description: Spring REST controller managing authentication-related endpoints such as registration, login, MFA verification, token refresh, and logout.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Handles user registration, creating a new applicant with MFA enabled by default, and returns a response with user info.

methods.name: loginStep1
methods.description: Handles initial login request, validating credentials, possibly initiating MFA challenge, and returning login status.

methods.name: verifyMfa
methods.description: Verifies MFA OTP for a given user and returns authentication tokens.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Refreshes authentication tokens, providing new access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Revoke the provided refresh token, effectively logging the user out.
